entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A C4 cereal grown in tropical regions

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A C4 cereal grown in tropical regions

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A C4 cereal grown in tropical regions

entities.name: HIGH EVAPORATIVE DEMAND
entities.description: Environmental state characterized by high vapor pressure deficit

entities.name: VPD
entities.description: Vapor Pressure Deficit, a measure of the drying power of the air

entities.name: MODERATE VPD
entities.description: VPD levels ranging from 2.2 to 2.8 kPa

entities.name: HIGH VPD
entities.description: VPD levels ranging from 3.9 to 4.5 kPa

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The process of water loss from plant leaves

entities.name: LEAF AREA
entities.description: The total surface area of plant leaves

entities.name: WATER CONSERVATION
entities.description: The ability of a crop to minimize water loss

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: Condition where soil moisture is limiting for the plant

entities.name: TE
entities.description: Transpiration Efficiency, the ratio of biomass produced to water transpired

entities.name: BIOMASS ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The growth and accumulation of organic matter in the plant

entities.name: TROPICAL REGIONS
entities.description: Geographic areas where C4 cereals are predominantly grown
